NAVAREA XIX 33/26
 NORWEGIAN SEA BARENTS SEA
 1. ONE SCIENTIFIC ROCKET WILL BE LAUNCHED IN PERIODE FROM 1930 TO 0100 UTC 06 MAR  TO 15 MAR.26
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA

 DANGER AREA OUTER
 A. 71-01.00N 011-54.00E
 B. 69-45.00N 014-19.00E
 C. 70-10.00N 016-21.00E
 D. 70-40.00N 016-53.00E
 E. 71-21.00N 016-05.00E

 DANGER AREA INNER
 A. 69-24.00N 015-47.00E
 B. 69-16.00N 015-56.00E
 C. 69-17.00N 016-06.00E
 D. 69-25.00N 016-05.00E

 ANDOEYA SPACE OPERATIONS CENTER CAN BE REACHED ON. TELEPHONE +47 94 07 59 44 / +47 76 14 44 28 OR MARITIME VHF CH 14/16,  E-MAIL MSO@ANDOYASPACE.NO
  
 2. REFERS NOTICES TO MARINERS 04/2026
